commands.review_summary:
The PR adds hook and cron warnings for returned isolated-run errors, prefers cron diagnostics for non-OK hook announcements, adds regression assertions, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main passes `/hooks/agent` `payload.model` into isolated cron, cron returns a preflight diagnostic for rejected models, and the hook boundary does not warn on returned non-OK results. The PR body also includes before/after live Gateway terminal output for the same rejected-model path.
